title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron 3 Super (120B Open Model)
description: NVIDIA officially released Nemotron 3 Super, a 120B parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) hybrid Mamba-Transformer model.

title: Anthropic Blacklisted by Trump Administration over 'Supply Chain Risk'
description: The Trump administration designated Anthropic as a 'supply chain risk,' effectively blacklisting the company from government contracts.

title: Meta's 'Avocado' AI Model Delayed Due to Performance Issues
description: Meta's next-generation foundational model, code-named 'Avocado,' has been delayed until at least May due to failing internal benchmarks.

title: DeepSeek V4 Multimodal Release Announced for Next Week
description: Chinese AI lab DeepSeek is set to release V4 next week. The new model is natively multimodal, supporting image and video generation.

title: Hacker News Launch: Spine Swarm for Visual Agent Collaboration
description: Spine Swarm launched on Hacker News, introducing a platform where multiple AI agents collaborate on a visual canvas.

title: ArXiv Research: Increased Agent Intelligence Can Harm Collective Outcomes
description: A new paper uses multi-agent simulations to show that as individual agents become more capable, they may engage in behaviors that lead to systemic collapse.
